architecture.summary: Port renderMarkdown from vskill-platform as HTML-string with dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Reuse existing getCaseHistory API and CaseHistoryEntry type. No new backend work.

integrations.summary: N/A - no external services. All APIs already exist in eval-server.

ui-ux.summary: Links open in new tab. History as collapsible section below LLM Output matching existing pattern. Last 10 runs with View All link to History panel. Add markdown table rendering.

performance.summary: N/A - local dev tool, no performance concerns. Limit history to 10 runs inline.

security.summary: N/A - local dev tool, XSS risk negligible. dangerouslySetInnerHTML acceptable.

edge-cases.summary: Empty history state handled. No relative link handling needed. Run limit of 10 with full history link.
